text: Here, as in I Tim. 4.9, it is not certain whether the ‘true saying’ means what has gone before, or what immediately follows. ‘Should be at pains to find honourable employment’; the sense might be ‘should be champions of all that is good’, but verse 14 below points to a more restricted interpretation.

The meaning probably is, that Christians should earn an honest living (cf. II Thess. 3.11), so as to be able to meet extraordinary expenses demanded of the congregation, such as those mentioned in the preceding verse.
